title: Croatian-Style Garlic Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry dish from Croatia, made with garlic and a variety of vegetables. This recipe is low in fat and perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: stir fry
ingredients.notes: any combination of vegetables such as bell peppers, carrots, broccoli

instructions: Heat the garlic oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and stir-fry for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the stir-fry vegetables and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until tender.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add the low fat soy sauce and stir-fry for another minute.
